business.name: The Monal Islamabad
business.address: 5, Capital Enclave, Main Islamabad Expressway, near PWD Interchange, Islamabad, 44000, Pakistan
business.description: The Monal â Pakistan's premier restaurant chain offering authentic Pakistani cuisine with breathtaking views. Dine at our locations in Lahore, Rawalpindi, Murree, Peshawar, and Bhera. Experience world-class dining, event spaces, and unforgettable moments.

ai.tagline: Savor Authentic Pakistani Cuisine with Stunning Views
ai.hero_subtitle: Indulge in a culinary journey at The Monal, where exquisite flavors meet breathtaking scenery.
ai.about_paragraph: The Monal Islamabad is a premier dining destination renowned for its authentic Pakistani cuisine and exceptional service. Nestled in a picturesque location, our restaurant promises an unforgettable experience, whether you're enjoying a meal with family or celebrating a special occasion.

reviews.text: "Had a great experience at Monal. Food was tasty, service was quick, and the view made the atmosphere special. Recommended!"

Definitely, Monal was on the top list to dine out with beautiful scenery in capital Islamabad.
Adventurer road, awesome service, good food worth the money.
I've been there 3 times, very much satisfied with food and services.
Will be missed. the restaurant is closed in 2025.

Memorable experience. Food quality and taste is top notch. Not very value for money 😔💰. Too much expensive. But experience and view is everything. Food spice levels and sugar and salt levels are very balanced. Very tasty food.   Every bite the taste is top notch and more than expected.  Always jam packed. Always wait for seat reservations. Standards and customer care are top priorities.

"Your restaurant is truly exceptional! The food is delicious, the atmosphere is warm and welcoming, and every detail shows your passion and hard work. I really appreciate the excellent service and the effort you put into making every guest feel special. It’s one of the best dining experiences I’ve ever had!"

Perfect dining experience, and I’ve complained at places that serve rs 18,000 steaks. The wait staff was very friendly, well mannered, and treated us like VIPs. The food was made exactly how we ordered it and came out fresh without any blemishes. The entire dining area and bathrooms were clean, and the view is incredible. I can’t wait to come back at different time of day to try other dishes and take more pictures!

Monal comes definitely at top of the list when we talk about bringing friends and family to enjoy your meal in a matchless environment. Service is good, could be better with a little bit more effort/ management keeping in view the class of visitors that visits. Overall experience was good, can be improved with a little bit effort.

Very good view point, Very good management and services. Despite being so much rushy on the weekend they managed it soo well. Hatsoff to the management. We not only got the parking easily, Also got the table vacant too. They have appointed their staff from 3 KM range to help and guide the traffic and to keep them in lane. We tried their fish and sandwiches. Taste was good as well.

They also had an electric car for pick n drop for free. We parked our car 500 meters away from the restaurant and they picked us up from that spot

Definitely on the top of the list is the beautiful location and environment.   The service is good, it could be better knowing that they have many foreigners visiting daily and their staff can hardly communicate, let alone discuss the menu and suggest something.   They should have a few dedicated servers or managers going to these tables.   They really need to see how good food standards are followed internationally, what are the expectations etc.  Overall experience was good.   Just some positive criticism.   The prices were so high that it was pointless for a common man to go to them, but still there was a good hotel restaurant.  Now it's time to say goodbye. After the Supreme Court's decision, this journey has ended forever

Its all about views and atmosphere. Went there with family and friends and its always the best dining experience and desi food is best with amazing customer service. I prefer to reserve table before visiting else you will might wait in waiting area for table. And sad part is that this place is closing soon so we might not able to visit this beautiful place again.

You are only paying for atmosphere, some dishes taste are good but most of don’t.
If you are mutton lover, then this place is not for you definitely. You can enjoy weather, environment and take some good pictures.
Prices are 3x as compared to market.

It is one of the best places to enjoy food in one of the best Capitals of the world. The curvy road to Monal Restaurant is itself a thrill and pleasure for several peoples. Food quality is good, but the restaurant itself is too expensive, though we know that filthy rich comes here. You get an amazing view of the whole Islamabad from here.  It is a perfect place to enjoy hot coffee in winter.

Best experience and very nice food. The staff was too humble and their behaviour was very good. We ordered 4 platters continental,Thai, Peshawari and Italian. All of them were delicious. We were sitting in the open ,the heaters were on and the waiters were distributing fleece blankets to the people sitting there. It was a beautiful sunset and really good live music was playing. I have made a video of the overall experience and uploaded on YouTube. Do check it out if you want to.

You are mainly paying for the atmosphere here. While a few dishes are good, most are not. If you love mutton, this place will likely disappoint you. However, the weather, environment, and photo opportunities are excellent. Be prepared for prices that are three times higher than average.

I loved this place It was an amazing experience with a mesmerising view, Even tho it was very busy the service was great. I love the fact that they had a stairlift for a wheelchair to go down a few steps and it did work lol, as in most places they don't cater for the needs of a disabled person.
These little things go along way.
I am so glad that we got to try this place out.
Great experience.
Great service.
Great food.
Very sad to hear it's closing.
You can read about the issue and dispute online.
Thank you for a great experience.
This place once was a landmark for Islamabad now just ruins left. Did bbq here with amazing view.
